revision.text:
<noinclude>{| class="wikitable"
|-
|</noinclude>style="background: var(--background-color-interactive, #EEE); color: var(--color-base, black); vertical-align: middle; white-space: nowrap; text-align: {{{align|center}}}; {{{style|}}}" class="table-Un­known" | {{{1|Un­known}}}<noinclude>
|}
{{Documentation|Template:Table cell templates/doc}}
</noinclude>

revision.comment: Bot: add {{wikidata link|Q...}} or [[Category:Templates without wikidata]]
revision.text: <noinclude>{| class="wikitable" |- |</noinclude>style="background: var(--background-color-interactive, #EEE); color: var(--color-base, black); vertical-align: middle; white-space: nowrap; text-align: {{{align|center}}}; {{{style|}}}" class="table-Un­known" | {{{1|Un­known}}}<noinclude> |} {{Documentation|Template:Table cell templates/doc}} </noinclude> <noinclude>[[Category:Templates without wikidata]]</noinclude>

revision.comment: imported only latest revision from https://archive.org/details/miraheze-wiki-shintowiki-20251218 to avoid excessive disk usage, comment on the revision was Text replacement - "↵<noinclude>[[Category:Templates without wikidata]]</noinclude>" to ""
revision.text:
<noinclude>{| class="wikitable"
|-
|</noinclude>style="background: var(--background-color-interactive, #EEE); color: var(--color-base, black); vertical-align: middle; white-space: nowrap; text-align: {{{align|center}}}; {{{style|}}}" class="table-Un­known" | {{{1|Un­known}}}<noinclude>
|}
{{Documentation|Template:Table cell templates/doc}}
</noinclude>

revision.comment: Bot: Adding dummy category to make categories work after wiki restoration
revision.text: <noinclude>{| class="wikitable" |- |</noinclude>style="background: var(--background-color-interactive, #EEE); color: var(--color-base, black); vertical-align: middle; white-space: nowrap; text-align: {{{align|center}}}; {{{style|}}}" class="table-Un­known" | {{{1|Un­known}}}<noinclude> |} {{Documentation|Template:Table cell templates/doc}} </noinclude> [[Category:Templates]]

revision.comment: Bot: wrap 1 stray tag(s) in noinclude [[github:EmmaLeonhart/shintowiki-scripts/actions/runs/23674194100|time triggered pipeline]]
revision.text: <noinclude>{| class="wikitable" |- |</noinclude>style="background: var(--background-color-interactive, #EEE); color: var(--color-base, black); vertical-align: middle; white-space: nowrap; text-align: {{{align|center}}}; {{{style|}}}" class="table-Un­known" | {{{1|Un­known}}}<noinclude> |} {{Documentation|Template:Table cell templates/doc}} </noinclude> <noinclude> [[Category:Templates]] [[Category:Templates fixed with noinclude]] </noinclude>

<noinclude>{| class="wikitable" |- |</noinclude>style="background: var(--background-color-interactive, #EEE); color: var(--color-base, black); vertical-align: middle; white-space: nowrap; text-align: {{{align|center}}}; {{{style|}}}" class="table-Un­known" | {{{1|Un­known}}}<noinclude> |} {{Documentation|Template:Table cell templates/doc}}
[[Category:Templates]] [[Category:Templates fixed with noinclude]] </noinclude>
